} nav a:hover { color: #ff6e7f; } main { padding: 20px; } form { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); padding: 20px; margin: 20px 0; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 110, 127, 0.5); border-radius: 8px; } form label { display: block; margin: 10px 0 5px; color: #ff6e7f; } form input[type="text"], form input[type="password"], form input[type="email"], form input[type="file"], form input[type="url"] { width: 100%; padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 1em; transition: background-color 0.3s ease; } form button:hover { background-color: #ff4e7f; } h2 { color: #ff6e7f; } ul { list-style-type: none; padding: 0; } ul li { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
